text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with T.M. Opera O were
dramatic, to say the least, but they have now
come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a decent record coupled with a lasting impact.
But the Centurial Overlord is not about to go
quiet.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas! How many times must our views clash?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! But now it makes sense. Now that I have
become the Centurial Overlord...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My life will become eternal. It's this grand design
which they couldn't hope to comprehend.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yes! Lend me your ears, Trainer! In honor of
my achievements...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A special race is to be held in my name.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They are calling it the T.M. Opera O
Commemoration Race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Isn't the name absolutely ingenious? With me as
its theme, can't you hear the underlying melody?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The name sounds a little on the nose if you ask
me, but it's a real honor either way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! The URA and I cannot come to an
agreement as to what the race should entail.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Unlike you, they do not comprehend the essence
of my greatness. It's been made evident by their
proposals.
choice_data_list: What kind of ideas do they have?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ones that are plain, ordinary, and dull.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I give a one-hour performance leading up to the
race and the victor receives a life-size trophy of
myself obligatorily via mail.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That is all they were willing to concede. How could such an underdeveloped event be called a commemoration for me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like they gave a lot of ground to her...
But it apparently isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the Centurial Overlord. It only makes sense
that they bend to my every whim.
choice_data_list: Well, what kind of race do you want?
Well, what kind of race do you want?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, a wonderful question...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It would take place at the newly constructed T.M.
Opera O Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Organized by me, hosted by me, attended by me,
and run by... me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the victor! I am the loser! And I am the
presenter!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A flawless race colored in my brilliant hue from
start to finish!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now that is an event worthy of the name T.M. Opera O Commemorative Race! Haaah ha ha!
choice_data_list: What you described isn't really a race though.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Mngh! Hm, now that you mention it, that may be
a fair point...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But we ought not to fuss over the specifics. This
will do so long as I am beautiful, with the
Centurial Overlord's authority thoroughly
apparent.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will make one more attempt to negotiate.
Accompany me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Show me what the Centurial Trainer can do at the
table.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm dragged away, like a cat taken by its scruff.
She's as reckless and demanding as ever.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lofty laughter echoes across the negotiating
table.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O not only stirs the pot—her antics
keep everyone well entertained.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. This is her stage, where the laughter
and surprises never end.
